title: JAIPBR(Just Another Integrated PBR)
description: 🌟✨This Pack Adds Integrated PBR(No Shader PBR) For Minecraft🦗📌 It Is Still WIP But Updates Will Be Released✨🌟
body:
🌟 JAIPBR (Just Another Integrated PBR) 🎨✨
🧱 A Vanilla-Style, Shader-Free PBR Pack for Minecraft 🧱

JAIPBR is a shader-free PBR-style resource pack for Minecraft Java Edition.
Instead of relying on external shaders or labPBR formats, this pack embeds baked normal and specular effects directly into the base texture, creating a 3D embossed look using just vanilla rendering.

It gives a realistic feel with a vanilla-inspired style, all without needing any mods or performance-heavy shaders! Perfect for lightweight realism lovers. 💻💡

🎯 Resolution: 128x
🎮 Style: Vanilla-like, faithful feel
🚧 Status: WIP — More blocks added regularly

💡 Features:

✅ No shaders required — works on vanilla Minecraft

🖼️ Baked normal/specular detail — depth and lighting in the texture itself

🧱 Realistic look while keeping Minecraft’s original charm

🛠️ Constant updates — frequently expanded and improved

🐢 Lightweight — no extra performance cost

🧪 Works great with OptiFine or Sodium/Iris (optional, not required)

🔗 Links:

▶️ YouTube Showcase: [Youtube Showcase Ri-- (Don't Watch!)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ)
☕ Support the project: [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/technotblade)

⚠️ Note:
This pack is still in progress. Some textures may be missing or placeholders.
Stay tuned for regular updates and enhancements! 🌞✨
